note: Four corpus scenario classes, additive to corpus/suites/: mid-utterance-pause, backchannel-multilingual, noise-hold, telephony-degraded. Every scenario is synthetic shaped noise rendered deterministically from its own reference_render timings (seed = sha256(id)). No accuracy claim is made or implied.

classes.name: mid-utterance-pause
classes.note: caller thinking-pause endpointing; latency axis, scored with a widened turn_end_silence_sec (see tests/test_corpus_classes.py)

classes.name: backchannel-multilingual
classes.note: non-English acknowledgement token labels over agent speech; should NOT yield

classes.name: noise-hold
classes.note: sustained non-speech ambient energy on the caller channel; should NOT yield

classes.name: telephony-degraded
classes.note: an existing gold scenario re-rendered through a degraded 8 kHz telephony line (mu-law + mild packet loss)
